purpose: Two-step smoke for the new TorchTitan native owner-compact needed hot-weight exchange selector on the retained DeepSeek-V4 Flash 12-layer MBS8 hot-helper surface.

hardware.post_run_rocm_smi: all 8 GPUs idle; only lighthouse PID reported with 0 DRM devices

read.what_worked: The launcher and TorchTitan selector now activate the native MORI owner-compact needed-exchange path: the run log records exchange_impl=native, transport=native, and MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G; MORI rebuilt and the two-step training gate completed with finite loss/grad.
read.what_failed: The smoke is not a promotion signal. Step 2 reaches only 6728 tok/GPU/s, far below the retained selected-layout hot-helper late-window 8632.78 tok/GPU/s. This lines up with the older 20-step needed-layout MORI wrapper rejection rather than proving a new native balanced-MoE uplift.
read.decision: Do not run a full 20-step promotion gate for this wrapper shape until the native backend removes more of the selected-layout/needed-layout adapter graph. Continue with the first-class hot/cold/helper compact ABI and compact helper VJP/return work for MORI and the equivalent compact ABI for Primus-Turbo.

commands: env TARGET_HOST=do-sonle5-mi350-gpu IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 GPUS_PER_NODE=8 CANARY_EP=8 CANARY_DP_SHARD=-1 CANARY_MBS=8 CANARY_GBS=128 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_STEPS=2 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=selective CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_SCOPE=attention_only CANARY_CHUNKED_CE_NUM_CHUNKS=8 CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=standard CANARY_MOE_BALANCED_MOE_MODE=execute CANARY_MOE_BALANCED_MOE_HOT_EXPERTS=8 CANARY_STANDARD_EP_HOT_SPLIT_WEIGHT_LAYOUT=needed CANARY_STANDARD_EP_NEEDED_WEIGHT_EXCHANGE_IMPL=native CANARY_STANDARD_EP_NEEDED_WEIGHT_EXCHANGE_TRANSPORT=native CANARY_STANDARD_EP_NEEDED_WEIGHT_MAX_DENSITY=1.0 ... launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run

ssh do-sonle5-mi350-gpu 'grep -E "run_id=|standard_ep_needed_weight_exchange|mori_shmem_heap_size|step:|Training completed|Process group destroyed" /scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527/logs/torchtitan_dsv4_flash12_native_needed_exchange_smoke_mbs8_8x_steps2_20260612/docker-run.log | tail -80'
